productName: Infused Pre-Roll Queen Of The South 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Queen Of The South flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of menthol, berry, and grape, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
